Object.Field: Remove existing data if the Id is the same
DELETE FROM ODS_CHINOOK.PLAYLISTTRACK a WHERE (a.PLAYLISTID, a.TRACKID) IN (SELECT s.PLAYLISTID, s.TRACKID FROM DSA_CHINOOK.PLAYLISTTRACK s)
DELETE FROM ODS_CHINOOK.INVOICELINE WHERE InvoiceLineId IN (SELECT InvoiceLineId FROM DSA_CHINOOK.INVOICELINE)
DELETE FROM ODS_CHINOOK.INVOICE WHERE InvoiceId IN (SELECT InvoiceId FROM DSA_CHINOOK.INVOICE)
DELETE FROM ODS_CHINOOK.TRACK WHERE TrackId IN (SELECT TrackId FROM DSA_CHINOOK.TRACK)
DELETE FROM ODS_CHINOOK.CUSTOMER WHERE CustomerId IN (SELECT CustomerId FROM DSA_CHINOOK.CUSTOMER)
DELETE FROM ODS_CHINOOK.ALBUM WHERE AlbumId IN (SELECT AlbumId FROM DSA_CHINOOK.ALBUM)
DELETE FROM ODS_CHINOOK.PLAYLIST WHERE PlaylistId IN (SELECT PlaylistId FROM DSA_CHINOOK.PLAYLIST)
DELETE FROM ODS_CHINOOK.EMPLOYEE WHERE EmployeeId IN (SELECT EmployeeId FROM DSA_CHINOOK.EMPLOYEE)
DELETE FROM ODS_CHINOOK.MEDIATYPE WHERE MediaTypeId IN (SELECT MediaTypeId FROM DSA_CHINOOK.MEDIATYPE)
DELETE FROM ODS_CHINOOK.GENRE WHERE GenreId IN (SELECT GenreId FROM DSA_CHINOOK.GENRE)
DELETE FROM ODS_CHINOOK.ARTIST WHERE ArtistId IN (SELECT ArtistId FROM DSA_CHINOOK.ARTIST)
